Video.summary: Filmed at the US Open Pickleball Championships in Naples, Florida, this Pro Women’s Doubles matchup features the powerhouse mother-daughter team Leigh and Anna Leigh Waters, known for their aggressive tactics and flawless communication. They square off against promising challengers Alexa Schull and Ava Cavataio, who bring fearless shot-making and tight teamwork to the court. From baseline drives to net duels, this clash of generations delivers fast-paced action, strategic rallies, and plenty of highlight-worthy moments.
Video.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2025 – Pro Women’s Doubles – Waters & Waters vs Schull & Cavataio

Image.alt: US Open Pickleball Championships 2025 – Pro Women’s Doubles – Waters & Waters vs Schull & Cavataio
US Open Pickleball Championships 2025 – Pro Women’s Doubles – Waters & Waters vs Schull & Cavataio
US Open Pickleball Championships 2025 – Pro Women’s Doubles – Waters & Waters vs Schull & Cavataio

Video.summary: It's a high-stakes "Wednesday evening pickleball party" on Day 6 of the World Pickleball League (WPBL) as Pune United takes on the Chennai Super Champs at the CCI Brabourne Stadium. With both teams currently sitting low on the points table (fifth and sixth), this game is a crucial must-win for both, offering a chance for one team to gain much-needed inspiration and move up the standings.
Video.title: WPBL 2025 - Pune vs. Chennai - Day 6 Tie 1

Image.alt: WPBL 2025 - Pune vs. Chennai - Day 6 Tie 1
WPBL 2025 - Pune vs. Chennai - Day 6 Tie 1
WPBL 2025 - Pune vs. Chennai - Day 6 Tie 1

NPL - Stingers vs United (Mens)
NPL - Stingers vs United (Mens)

Video.summary: Live from Bolton Arena in Greater Manchester, this Group A match at the English Nationals 2023 features Daniel Wren and Alex Woolf squaring off against Sebastien Malbois and Roberto Rospo. The teams bring a mix of controlled setups, powerful drives, and smart resets as they battle for an early advantage in the tournament.Expect sharp exchanges at the kitchen, tactical stacking, and impressive shot-making as both sides fight for momentum in this fast-paced men’s doubles opener.
Video.title: English Nationals 2023 – Men’s Doubles Open Group A Match 1 – Wren & Woolf vs Malbois & Rospo

Image.alt: English Nationals 2023 – Men’s Doubles Open Group A Match 1 – Wren & Woolf vs Malbois & Rospo
English Nationals 2023 – Men’s Doubles Open Group A Match 1 – Wren & Woolf vs Malbois & Rospo
English Nationals 2023 – Men’s Doubles Open Group A Match 1 – Wren & Woolf vs Malbois & Rospo

Video.summary: With Ray Colaiacovo sitting in for Tim Ring, Dave Benz talks about the growing craze of pickleball and how Pickleball first arrived to the masses on national TV via the US Open Pickleball Championship.
Video.title: The U.S. Open of Pickleball and the beginning of Pickleball on national TV

Image.alt: The U.S. Open of Pickleball and the beginning of Pickleball on national TV
The U.S. Open of Pickleball and the beginning of Pickleball on national TV
The U.S. Open of Pickleball and the beginning of Pickleball on national TV

Video.summary: The World Pickleball League (WPBL) action heats up on Day 4 with a crucial clash between the Hyderabad Superstars and Mumbai Pickle Power at the CCI Brabourne Stadium. The commentary team emphasizes that the winner of this tie has the potential to go level on points with the table toppers, making this a vital match for semi-final qualification.
Video.title: WPBL 2025 - Hyderabad vs. Mumbai - Day 4 Tie 1

Video.summary: At the 2024 US Open Pickleball Championships, J.W. Johnson faces off against Brandon Lane in a hard-fought Men's Pro Singles Backdraw Semifinal. With powerful rallies, strategic drops, and relentless pressure, this match highlights Johnson's athleticism and Lane’s grit as they fight for a spot in the finals. Recorded live on Zing Zang Championship Court in Naples, Florida.
Video.title: US Open 2024 – Men’s Pro Singles Backdraw Semifinal – Johnson vs Lane

Image.alt: US Open 2024 – Men’s Pro Singles Backdraw Semifinal – Johnson vs Lane
US Open 2024 – Men’s Pro Singles Backdraw Semifinal – Johnson vs Lane
US Open 2024 – Men’s Pro Singles Backdraw Semifinal – Johnson vs Lane

Video.summary: Get ready for a great singles match as Simone Jardim takes on Kristen Kopp at the Usopp National Pickleball Center. This venue, home to the Usopp Pickleball Academy, is a hub for lessons and training, making it an amazing facility for all things pickleball.

Video.summary: Experience the pinnacle of collegiate pickleball as Virginia Tech and Liberty University battle for the NCPA 2025 Virginia Beach Regional title. This high-stakes championship matchup features a prize pool of $2,500 and a chance for regional dominance.The action kicks off with an elite men’s doubles match featuring Liberty’s Ben Rice and Derek Cray against Virginia Tech’s undefeated Cody Miller and Caelan Funk. The broadcast also captures intense singles play and critical mixed doubles rallies as both teams fight through high-tension dink battles and "Dreambreaker" level strategy. Watch for standout defensive plays, including ATP (Around the Post) attempts and high-speed hand battles on the Championship Court at Pickleball Virginia Beach.
Video.title: Team Championship Match - Virginia Tech vs. Liberty University

Image.alt: Team Championship Match - Virginia Tech vs. Liberty University
Team Championship Match - Virginia Tech vs. Liberty University
Team Championship Match - Virginia Tech vs. Liberty University

Video.summary: Welcome to Week 3, Day 1 of the NCPA San Diego Regional 2025, live from the Barnes Tennis Center in the heart of San Diego, California. This highly anticipated state rivalry pits the UCLA Bruins against the SDSU Aztecs in a crucial best-of-seven collegiate team match.The match format prioritizes singles, with UCLA winning the coin toss and opting to start with Women's Singles. The broadcast features the Women's Singles match between Mae Lee (UCLA) and Emily Miller (SDSU), and the Men's Singles where SDSU's Preston Lynch takes a commanding early lead. The match also includes Gender Doubles, where SDSU (the Aztecs) took an early 3-0 lead in the overall match score. The winner of this pool play match gains a strong position for seeding, moving closer to securing one of the National Championship bids.
Video.title: NCPA San Diego Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - UCLA vs. SDSU

Image.alt: NCPA San Diego Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - UCLA vs. SDSU
NCPA San Diego Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - UCLA vs. SDSU
NCPA San Diego Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - UCLA vs. SDSU

Video.summary: The 2025 European Pickleball Championships in Rome, Italy, hosts the high-stakes Women's Doubles Open Final featuring Team England against Team Spain. Defending champions Spain, represented by the powerhouse duo of Sabrina Mendez and Glauka Carvajal, look to secure their second consecutive title against the English pair of Thaddea Lock and Katy Morris.
Video.title: Women's Doubles Open Final - Lock/Morris vs. Mendez/Carvajal

Image.alt: Women's Doubles Open Final - Lock/Morris vs. Mendez/Carvajal
Women's Doubles Open Final - Lock/Morris vs. Mendez/Carvajal
Women's Doubles Open Final - Lock/Morris vs. Mendez/Carvajal
